\tzpentry{ID3589}{Gyromagnetic Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3589 introduces Gyromagnetic Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{L}_{\text{total}} = T_{\text{gyro}} + T_{\text{field}} - U_{\text{mag}} - U_{\text{constraint}} + \mathcal{L}_{\text{coupling}} \end{equation}
